profile.summary: Analyst focused on SQL, dashboards, and stakeholder storytelling.

jobDescription: Harbor Retail needs a Product Data Analyst to write SQL, build Tableau dashboards, run A/B analyses, and partner with product managers. Python for data wrangling is expected.
cvText:
Priya Shah
Data Analyst

Experience:
- Data Analyst at MarketBasket Co (2019-2025)
- Built Tableau dashboards for merchandising KPIs
- Wrote complex SQL and light Python ETL scripts
- Supported three A/B tests on checkout UX

Skills: SQL, Python, Tableau, statistics basics
Education: MSc Statistics, Northern Institute
baselineCoverLetter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am interested in the Product Data Analyst role at Harbor Retail. At MarketBasket Co I wrote SQL, built Tableau dashboards, used Python for wrangling, and supported A/B tests on checkout UX with product partners.

I would be glad to apply the same analytical rigor to your product questions.

Sincerely,
Priya Shah
